name: economic-research-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to 《经济研究》 (Economic Research Journal), the top economics journal in China. Covers China-context topic selection, bilingual literature review, modern causal identification (DID / IV / RDD / DML), mechanism and heterogeneity analysis, three-line tables, policy implications, journal house style, and R&R rebuttals. Bilingual zh-CN / en docs; Stata / R / Python templates.
